interactions.name: theme-listbox
interactions.delta: Opens a small listbox with options Light / Dark / System. Selecting Dark adds class 'dark' to <html> (class becomes '... dark'), flipping the whole page to slate-900 dark surfaces. Persists to localStorage['theme']. Boot script applies stored/system theme before paint.

interactions.name: search-modal
interactions.delta: Body innerHTML grows ~2700 chars. A [role=dialog] is inserted: backdrop div 'fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-sm' + centered white (dark:slate-800) rounded-xl shadow-xl panel containing a search form with 'Find something…' input. Esc / outside-click removes it.

interactions.name: mobile-nav
interactions.delta: Opens a left slide-over drawer: close-X + diamond logo at top, then the full 5-section sidebar nav. A blurred backdrop covers the rest to the right. Esc / backdrop-click closes.

interactions.name: sidebar-active-dot
interactions.delta: Active link: text-sky-500 + visible sky-500 before:dot. Inactive: text-slate-500, before:dot hidden; on hover text-slate-600 and the slate-300 dot reveals (before:block).

interactions.name: toc-scrollspy
interactions.delta: The 'On this page' TOC link for the heading currently in view gets text-sky-500; others are slate-500 with hover:text-slate-600.

interactions.name: quicklink-card-hover
interactions.delta: Hover fades in a gradient border (linear-gradient indigo-400 / cyan-400 / sky-500 via mask) and a sky-50 (dark slate-800) tinted bg behind the card (group-hover:opacity-100).

interactions.name: prose-link-underline
interactions.delta: Prose links use an inset box-shadow underline (sky-300/sky-800) that thickens on hover via --tw-prose-underline-size 4px -> 6px.
